Meanwhile, at Mission Control, astronaut Ken Mattingly, flight director Gene Kranz and a heroic ground crew race against time - and the odds - to bring them home.

programme.title: Sweet As
programme.desc: In remote Pilbara country in Western Australia, troubled 16 year old Indigenous girl, Murra, finds herself abandoned after an explosive incident with her drug fuelled mother. On the cusp of being lost in the 'Child Protection' system, an unusual lifeline is thrown her way by her uncle Ian, the local cop, in the form of a unique Photo Safari. Before Murra knows it, she is careening down a dusty highway with a minibus full of 'at risk' teens and two charismatic team leaders. Will this be the lifeline Murra needs or a catalyst for her demise? An uplifting coming-of-age road movie about unconventional friendships, first crushes and finding who you are on the road less travelled.

programme.title: Moonrise Kingdom
programme.desc: On an island off the coast of New England in the summer of 1965, two 12-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness. As various authorities try to hunt them down, a violent storm is brewing off-shore - and the peaceful island community is turned upside down in every which way.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The most brilliant mind at America's top university isn't a student, he's the kid who cleans the floors. Will Hunting is a headstrong, working-class genius who is failing the lessons of life. After one too many run-ins with the law, Will's last chance is a psychology professor, who might be the only man who can reach him. Finally forced to deal with his past, Will discovers that the only one holding him back is himself.

programme.title: The Dry
programme.desc: Federal Agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town to attend the tragic funeral of his childhood friend. But his return opens a decades-old wound.

programme.title: Last Days
programme.desc: A Seattle-set rock and roll drama about a musician whose life and career is reminiscent of Nirvana's Kurt Cobain. Blake is a brilliant, but troubled musician. Success has left him in a lonely place, where livelihoods rest on his shoulders and old friends regularly tap him for money and favours. The story follows Blake through a handful of hours spent in and near his wooded home - a fugitive from his own life.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closing of a local restaurant concerns a number of employees who've dedicated their lives to the eatery.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: When his family moves from their home in Berlin to a strange new house in Poland, young Bruno befriends Shmuel, a boy who lives on the other side of the fence where everyone seems to be wearing striped pyjamas. Unaware of Shmuel's fate as a Jewish prisoner or the role his own Nazi father plays in his imprisonment, Bruno embarks on a dangerous journey inside the camp's walls.

programme.title: Boy Erased
programme.desc: Boy Erased tells the courageous story of Jared Eamons (Lucas Hedges), the son of a Baptist pastor in a small American town, who must overcome the fallout of being outed to his parents (Nicole Kidman and Russell Crowe). His parents struggle with reconciling their love for their son with their beliefs. Fearing a loss of family, friends, and community, Jared is pressured into attending a conversion therapy program. While there, Jared comes into conflict with its leader (Joel Edgerton) and begins his journey to finding his own voice and accepting his true self.

programme.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
programme.desc: When a writing assignment lands journalist Raoul Duke and sidekick Dr Gonzo in Las Vegas, they decide to make it the ultimate business trip. But before long, business is forgotten and trip has become the key word. Fuelled by a suitcase full of mind-bending pharmaceuticals, Duke and Gonzo set off on a fast and furious ride through non stop neon, surreal surroundings and a crew of the craziest characters. But no matter where misadventure leads them, Duke and Gonzo discover that sometimes going too far is the only way to go.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: In May 1940, Germany advance into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. In a heroic mission, British and French forces evacuate thousands of soldiers.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: Three 1978 Hell's Kitchen housewives whose mobster husbands are sent to prison take the mafia matters into their own hands, proving unexpectedly adept at everything.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: Meet Jack Foley, the most successful bank robber in the country. On the day he busts out of jail, he finds himself stealing something far more precious than money Karen Siscos heart. She's smart. She's sexy. And unfortunately for Jack, she's a Federal Marshall. Now, they're willing to risk it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Fear and paranoia grip San Francisco as a killer sends terrifying threats and cryptic codes to police and publishers.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and little to show for it. Now, Max has to transport Vincent to his next job, one night, five stops, five hits and one getaway. And after this fateful night, neither man will ever be the same again. Tonight everything is changing.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: Set in South Boston, where the state police force is waging an all-out war to take down the city's top organised crime ring. The key is to end the reign of powerful mob boss Frank Costello from the inside. A young rookie, Billy Costigan, is assigned to infiltrate Costello's mob. While Billy is working to gain Costello's trust, another young cop, Colin Sullivan, is among a handful of elite officers whose mission is to bring Costello down.

programme.title: 21 Grams
programme.desc: A college professor, an ex-con and a young mother are brought together by fate. Now vengeance will take them to the heights of love, the depths of revenge and the promise of redemption.

programme.title: As Good as it Gets
programme.desc: An antisocial writer, a single mother, and a gay artist become unlikely friends in this comedy-drama.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: All The Way
programme.desc: Lyndon B Johnson becomes the President of the United States in the chaotic aftermath of JFK's assassination and spends his first year in office trying to quickly pass the Civil Rights Act.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: The true story of a real-life friendship between beloved neighbour Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Andrea Arnold's Wuthering Heights is an excitingly fresh and distinct take on the classic novel by Emily Bronte. An epic love story that spans childhood well into the young adult years, the film follows Heathcliff, a boy taken in by a benevolent Yorkshire farmer, Earnshaw. Living in Earnshaw's home, Heathcliff develops a passionate relationship with the farmer's teenage daughter, Catherine, inspiring the envy and mistrust of his son, Hindley. When Earnshaw passes away, the now-grown characters must finally confront the intense feelings and rivalries that have built up throughout their years together.

programme.title: The 33
programme.desc: The incredible true story of 33 miners who were trapped for 69 days following the collapse of the gold and copper mine.

programme.title: Jersey Boys
programme.desc: This big screen version of the Broadway musical tells the story of the four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the iconic '60s rock group The Four Seasons. Their trials and triumphs are accompanied by the hit songs that influenced a generation and are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the stage musical.

programme.title: The Mule
programme.desc: Earl, a broke man in his 80s, is offered a job that simply requires him to drive. Unbeknownst to Earl, he's just signed on as a drug courier for a Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Billy Beane is a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: Blow
programme.desc: George Jung is the son of Fred, a struggling small business owner. Seeing his family struggle to make ends meet and failing, George vows never to share a similar fate. Moving to California with his friend, Tuna, he finds success by selling marijuana in the 1960s, but ends up in prison for it. He then becomes extremely rich by working with Pablo Escabar by importing cocaine into America, but trouble escalates when the FBI are in pursuit.

programme.title: Fatale
programme.desc: After a wild one-night stand, a successful sports agent watches his perfect life slowly disappear when he discovers that the sexy and mysterious woman he risked everything for, is a determined police detective who entangles him in her latest investigation. As he tries desperately to put the pieces together, he falls deeper into her trap, risking his family, his career, and even his life. A suspenseful and provocative psychological thriller and an unpredictable game of cat and mouse where one mistake can change your life.

programme.title: The Guernsey Literary & Potato Peel P...
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling novel, set in London in the late 1940's, the cosmopolitan journalist Juliet Ashton receives a strange letter from Dawsey Adams - a charming and eccentric farmer who lives on the island of Guernsey. An exchange of letters unfolds during which Juliet learns of the existence of the club "The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society". The literary society was founded by some islanders - inexperienced readers - to help out over the difficult times of the German occupation in World War II on the Channel Islands. Juliet decides to write about the club and travel to Guernsey. Her stay there and the encounter with Dawsey will change her life forever.

programme.title: Penguin Bloom
programme.desc: A young mother's world is shattered after a near-fatal accident leaves her paralysed. As she and her family struggle to adjust, an unlikely ally enters their world: an injured baby magpie.

programme.title: Any Given Sunday
programme.desc: Life is a contact sport and football is life. At the 50-yard line of this gridiron cosmos is Tony D'Amato, the embattled Sharks coach facing a full-on blitz of team strife, plus a new, marketing-savvy Sharks owner who's sure Tony is way too old school. An injured quarterback, a flashy, bull-headed backup quarterback, a slithery team doctor and a running back with an incentive-laden contract also provide some of the stories that zigzag like diagrams in a playbook.

programme.title: The Late Shift
programme.desc: When Johnny Carson announces his retirement from the Tonight Show, it throws the networks, and their executives, two talk-show stars and millions of late night television viewers into a frenzy. Who could replace the most important talk-show host in history? It soon comes down to the Tonight Show's guest host Jay Leno, and the later late night star David Letterman in a fight to the finish. Take a peek behind television's most famous curtains to witness for yourself the madness, the mayhem and the money that made the battle for the Tonight Show hot-seat one of the most brutally contested - and hilarious - battles in television history. We all know who replaced Johnny Carson, but no one knew how he got there until now.

programme.title: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy
programme.desc: A masterful adaptation of John le Carre's bestselling novel that redefined the spy thriller. At the height of the Cold War, a precarious operation goes deadly wrong, and the head of British Intelligence wonders if a double agent is leaking vital secrets. Brought out of retirement to expose the potential mole, master spy George Smiley is the only one who can be trusted to expose one of their own. Or can he? As the emotional and physical tolls mount on the high-ranking suspects, Smiley will be forced into the ultimate international spy game where everyone's motives are in question.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime. Inspector Harry Callahan (known as Dirty Harry by his peers through his reputation handling of homicidal cases) is assigned to the case along with his newest partner Inspector Chico Gonzalez to track down Scorpio and stop him. Using humiliation and cat and mouse type of games against Callahan, Scorpio is put to the test with the cop with a dirty attitude.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: Power company repairman Roy Neary witnesses unidentified flying objects in the skies near his Muncie, Indiana home. The encounter sets into action a startling chain of dramatic events. Trying desperately to understand what he has seen, Neary is increasingly driven to the emotional edge by the governmental cover up that's blocking him. With his wife struggling in vain to understand what is happening as their relationship disintegrates, Neary finds an ally in Jillian Guiler, a woman who has also witnessed nocturnal encounters and whose young son has been abducted by the alien visitors. As Roy and Jillian look for an answer to the extraordinary mystery that has engulfed them, an international team of scientists led by Claude Lacombe, a dedicated French expert on extraordinary phenomena, also pursues the truth. As Lacombe and company seek to understand the phenomenon of the skies and look for a communications break-through, their cosmic detective work reaches from the Indiana plains across the world to a remote hillside in India and then to the one place that holds the answer in an ultimate close encounter.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Wildcats
programme.desc: As the daughter of a legendary grid iron star, a young woman's greatest desire is to coach a team of her own. But when the chauvinistic powers-that-be assign her to an inner-city ghetto school, the spirited female has her work cut out for her.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: Every Which Way But Loose
programme.desc: Philo Beddoe likes beer, brawling and country music. When he falls for a sexy singer, he sets out to win her with Clyde his orangutan in tow.

programme.title: The Big Lebowski
programme.desc: The Dude, Jeff Lebowski is unemployed and laid-back until victim of mistaken identity, two thugs break into his apartment in the errant belief that they are accosting Jeff Lebowski the pasadena millionare. In the hope of getting a replacement for his soiled carpet Dude visits his wealthy namesake and, with buddy, ex 'nam' veteran, Walter, he is swept into a consequence comedy/thriller of extortion, embezzlement, sex & dope.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. Realising he is legally powerless to protect his beautiful wife Leigh and his troubled teenage daughter Danielle, Sam resorts to unorthodox measures which lead to an unforgettable showdown on Cape Fear.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: We are initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. We will navigate swamps, prowl Manhattan streets, search every house and doghouse. And since Marshal Sam Gerard leads the hunt, we will experience suspense, action and daring twists every step of the way.

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire
programme.desc: A full-blooded insight into the centuries-old relationship between a regal vampire and his immortal victim, told through an interview with a journalist.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Neve Campbell, Fairuza Balk and Robin Tunney star in this teen thriller about four private school misfits who form a coven to summon the dark forces they need to wreak havoc on their persecutors. Having just moved to Los Angeles, Sarah (Tunney) is an outsider at St. Benedict's Academy until she meets three other social outcasts. Nancy (Balk), Bonnie (ampbell) and Rochelle (Rachel True) will never fit in with the "in" crowd. Nancy, Bonnie and Rochelle dabble in the occult, and when they notice Sarah has the powers of a natural witch, they talk her into joining their coven. With the addition of a fourth witch they find they can cast spells they couldn't before, and the teenage witches are suddenly not only able to get the attention, praise and love they have long been denied, but also to exact vengeance on classmates, parents and boyfriends. They learn, however, that everything comes with a price. Support cast includes Skeet Ulrich and Rachel True.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: Gotham City faces two monstrous criminal menaces: the bizarre, sinister Penguin and the slinky, mysterious Catwoman. Can Batman battle two formidable foes at once? Especially when one wants to be mayor and the other is romantically attracted to Bruce Wayne?

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marcellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an ageing boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: The Dark Knight is back, now battling two supervillains simultaneously, but this time joined by his protege, Robin, to protect Gotham City. They face criminal geniuses The Riddler and Two-Face. Together, these criminal kingpins present a threat that only the dynamic duo, Batman and Robin, can stop.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A magical sword, a notorious assassin, a nobleman's daughter, a breathtaking quest: it adds up to the top foreign language film of all time.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: With the Klingon Empire on the verge of collapse, the Klingons turn to their old enemy, The Federation, for help. But first, Kirk and his crew must unravel a deadly conspiracy against the peacemakers.

programme.title: Against the Wall
programme.desc: A guard is caught up in a prison riot fuelled by bad prison management.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: During WWII, a man persuaded to live on an isolated island and spot aircraft finds himself responsible for a teacher and several students, all female.

programme.title: Star Trek: Generations
programme.desc: Captain Picard, with the help of supposedly dead Captain Kirk, must stop a madman willing to murder on a planetary scale in order to enter an energy ribbon.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sgt John Spartan doesn't fight crime. He rips into it like a junkyard dog. He's the Demolition Man. And he's the future's only hope. Arch criminal Simon Phoenix has fled a 35-year CryoPrison deep freeze to find a serene non-violent Southern California ready for the taking. Unable to deal with his psychopathic 1990s style, authorities seek an old-fashioned cop to fight old-fashioned crime. They revive Spartan, currently in CryoPrison from his last encounter with Phoenix.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Max stumbles into a desert city in the post-apocalyptic world that is built on the principle of unbridled, cutthroat capitalism where anything - even a human life - can be bartered. Caught in a power struggle between the city's two rulers, Max breaks the one inviolable rule of a city with no other rules when he refuses to kill.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the Police Academy will be open to any and all applicants. Now the first cadets, a collection of oddballs, eccentrics and misfits will soon be let loose on the streets. That is if they somehow manage to graduate in this worldwide hit comedy that started the series of Police Academy films.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: With personal crises and age weighing in on them, LAPD officers Riggs and Murtaugh must contend with a deadly Chinese crime lord trying to get his brother out of prison.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: Twelve American soldiers, all criminals, get a chance at redemption on a killing mission in World War II.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A squad of raw Marines endure boot camp under a terrifying drill instructor before descending into the horror of battle.

programme.title: Batman (1989)
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of his parents as a child, millionaire philanthropist Bruce Wayne pledges his life to fighting crime disguised as Batman. His long-time nemesis, The Joker, has sinister plans for the citizens of Gotham City. The Joker's greed is matched by his obsession with photojournalist Vicki Vale. Batman is there to counter the Joker's every move. With the fate of Gotham and Vicki in the balance, will good or evil prevail?

programme.title: Jaws 3
programme.desc: When a young great white shark gets into a theme park, the manager keeps it for a new exhibit. But he didn't expect the angry mother to turn up looking for it.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with charming, yet quirky real estate scion Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger, darker and more disturbing as time passes. But when Kathie disappears in 1982, her family and friends are deeply disturbed that her disappearance isn't taken seriously by police. While Durst is currently in jail awaiting trial for the murder of his close friend, journalist Susan Berman, the questions linger as to what really happened to Kathie. This film pulls back the curtain on the world of Robert Durst and explores what may have happened between him and Kathie.

programme.title: Once Upon a Main Street
programme.desc: Amelia, who wants to open a year-round Christmas store, bids for a shop lot against Vic, who wants to open a chocolate shop. Rivalry becomes romance when they must work together.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa Banks thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: Back in Louisiana for Christmas, Noelle Collins has big plans to resurrect the town's live nativity, a beloved tradition that her late mother used to put on. Things become complicated, however, when Noelle runs into her high school sweetheart, Nick Russell, a rising baseball star also back home due to a recent injury. Still feeling the burn from their senior year break-up, their lives are pushed together even further when they learn their parents share an attraction and want to be more than just friends. When things begin to fall apart with the live nativity Nick and Noelle reluctantly team up to pull off the show and find themselves growing close, uncovering a hometown love for each other and the joy of Christmas that both never really faded away.

programme.title: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: While clasping her favourite Christmas snow globe, a cynical, overworked TV executive rants about how the movies she produces lie, making you think dreams come can come true. Upset, she tries to smash the globe, but instead it hits her on the head, knocking her out. She wakes up in a perfect snow-covered town like the one in her globe.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Having been jilted at the altar, a literary aide to a controversial author thinks nothing of a fleeting liaison with a man she meets on a business flight.

programme.title: Ice Road Killer
programme.desc: Follows Helen and her daughter Lauren, who go on a trip to an isolated cabin in the cold north and meet a hitchhiker who actually is a thief trying to evade a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare as his jealous rage ultimately led to a brutal attack. Incredibly, Grace was able to escape and go into hiding. Fearing for her life and the safety of other women Paul might seduce, Grace works with the police to bring Paul to justice.

programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: Every year, Isabelle and her high school sweetheart Mike, rocked their small town's annual Christmas Eve Pageant with a sweet Christmas duet. But after graduation, Isabelle left to study at Juilliard in New York - leaving Mike behind. Years later, when Isabelle returns to her hometown to write music for the annual Christmas Eve Pageant, she is shocked to learn that Mike is the one directing the show. Can Isabelle and Mike put the past behind them and reunite on stage for another show-stopping duet?

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher ten years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad. When the attacks start up again shortly after her arrival, she must find the killer before they get to her first.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive, and they have to fight both man and nature to make it out.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Wish Upon a Christmas
programme.desc: When Amelia returns home to enforce layoffs at a family-run ornament company, she finds herself rekindling an old romance with her high school boyfriend Jesse.

programme.title: Christmas Reservations
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Treeline Ski Resort, where Holly plans every event and keeps all the guests happy. When her college sweetheart checks in, Holly discovers she has her own reservations about life and love.

programme.title: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: While clasping her favourite Christmas snow globe, a cynical, overworked TV executive rants about how the movies she produces lie, making you think dreams come can come true. Upset, she tries to smash the globe, but instead it hits her on the head, knocking her out. She wakes up in a perfect snow-covered town like the one in her globe.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.title: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Two strangers offer to share the last remaining room at a bed-and-breakfast when a snowstorm strands their flight in Montana on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: Ruth and her husband, Ed's, tranquil life in Wichita, Kansas is suddenly turned upside down when Ed suffers a heart attack. As Ed fights for his life in the hospital, Ruth starts to receive mysterious threats, leaving her in a state of panic.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Circle Of Deception
programme.desc: Based on the New York Times bestseller by Ann Rule. A small island community is turned upside down when one of the town's citizens, Russel Douglas, is found dead the day after Christmas. Brenna Douglas was Russel's estranged and soon-to-be ex-wife, who often complained to her former beauty queen best friend Peggy Sue Thomas that Russel was physically and emotionally abusive. Through an investigation that twists and winds its way through neighbors, a wife, and best friends, Russel's murderer is finally revealed.

programme.title: Framed By My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge by a spurned suitor, and enlists her help to prevent the accusations from going public. June agrees to help him pay off the extortionist, but when the woman is found dead, June becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy Thompson is a vibrant law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend she met once. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes the difficult decision to keep her baby, despite the fact that Demetri continues to stalk and harass her as she waits for the long-delayed trial. She gives birth to a beautiful little girl and decides to flee him and start over in Atlanta. Six years later, Demetri finds her and, to her horror, sues her for custody of her daughter. Using her own legal and investigative skills, Amy fights back.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, this is the story of Sarah, a teenager imprisoned by her father in the basement of their family home for over twenty years. The father told his wife and other children that Sarah had run away to be with a boyfriend the family disapproved of. Meanwhile, as the years went by, he would secretly visit her in the basement, raping her there while her mother and siblings continued living upstairs. Sarah gave birth alone in the basement to several children. Her father let her raise one there but brought the others upstairs, claiming to his wife that Sarah has left the grandchildren on their doorstep. When Sarah finally escapes, the family learns the devastating truth about what had been going on for years right beneath their feet.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: You Can't Escape Me
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is finally done with her abusive husband. She knows she must start over. She thinks she is safe in Portland with a friend, but she finds herself in danger.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere. While Aidan waits for a tow truck, Charlie heads to a nearby diner to find help. When Aidan goes missing, Charlie finds herself stranded in a strange town unsure who to trust. The only thing she knows is she might just be their only chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: Grace becomes addicted to opioids after suffering a sports injury. She's ready to leave her addiction behind under her mother's watch, but Richie kidnaps her to sell her into human trafficking.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: However, her world soon comes crashing down when a woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to Leo.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby Landry has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, a Cajun spiritual healer, and her drunken, outcast Grandpere Jack. Her life is filled with hope and promise, especially when her attraction for handsome Paul Tate blossoms into a mysterious, wonderful love. But Paul's wealthy parents forbid him to associate with a poor Landry while Grandmere urges her to follow her dream of becoming a great painter. In a faded photograph, Ruby glimpses for the first time the image of her father and learns of a shameful deception and a shocking scheme of blackmail that now must come to light. Stunned by these revelations, she is devastated when Grandmere dies, leaving her to seek out her father in his vast New Orleans mansion. There, in a house of lies, madness, and cruel torment, Ruby clings to her memories of Paul to keep her heart alive. For only their love can save her now.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dim-witted blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia in a globetrotting, air-headed comedy. Two fair-haired beauties have just witnessed a high-profile mob hit, and now the Godfather is convinced that they have what it takes to rub out his most fearsome rival. After accepting a hearty payout and agreeing to carry out the dangerous assignment, the two brainless beauties hit the open road on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: A Dangerous Affair
programme.desc: Amelie begins a steamy affair with Pierce, but the duo soon find themselves dangerously intertwined after Amelie comes face-to-face with a masked woman following a murder.

programme.title: A Country Christmas Story
programme.desc: A starry-eyed young girl journeys from the mountains of Appalachia to the stage at Dollywood, where she discovers the impact of African Americans on the world of country music.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Murder
programme.desc: In the middle of preparing for her business' biggest season, Diana Hart learns she inherited an old house from her beloved aunt who was murdered.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship. But when a mysterious woman moves in next door and befriends the younger boy, Bart, he begins a strange transformation and displays accusatory behaviour towards Cathy and Christopher. When Christopher discovers their mysterious neighbour is, in fact, his mother Corrine Dollanganger, all of the family's long-hidden secrets are revealed in a tragic climax.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: The Christmas Pact
programme.desc: Can best friends fall in love? That's the question next door neighbours Sadie and Ben will answer as they keep the spirit of Christmas and the magic of their childhood pact alive! When they were eight years old, they planted a scrawny 3-foot tall Christmas tree behind their church and the Christmas Pact began. But as life gets in the way the pact is threatened to be broken. Ben and Sadie need some Christmas Magic to recommit to each other and promise to keep their special holiday traditions. With each Christmas that passes by, Ben and Sadie's Christmas tree grows taller and stronger; and so does their love. The pact bearing fruit to the magic of Christmas and the undeniable answer. Yes, friends can fall in love! love!

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana Bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness. Even after a year as a Dumas, Ruby still wonders at the splendor of the family's New Orleans mansion and rejoices in the love of the father she had never known. But true happiness in her new home is as elusive as the swamp mist. Ruby must carefully avoid her venomous stepmother, Daphne, while making every effort to befriend her twin sister, Gisselle. While attending Greenwood, the exclusive girls' boarding school, Ruby doesn't lose hope in a world that never really wanted her. Ruby will have to summon every last ounce of her Cajun strength to reclaim her home, her future, and the happiness she once knew.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher and Carrie escaped from their grandparents attic at Foxworth Hall, the story continues to follow the twisted plight of the family as they attempt to put their sordid past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind. When Cathy finds herself in an abusive relationship with a fellow dancer, Julian, Christopher and Cathy are forced to face the forbidden feelings they developed for one another while coming of age during captivity.

programme.title: Whitney
programme.desc: Chronicles the headline-making relationship between the iconic singer, actress, producer and model Whitney Houston and singer and songwriter Bobby Brown from the time they first met at the very height of their celebrity to their courtship and tumultuous marriage.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns that her stepfather, whom she hasn't seen in years, suffered a deadly fall down the stairs at the family home and that her estranged mother has been arrested for his murder. As she begins to investigate what happened, she discovers that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: When Jessica is falsely charged with the murder of her best friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her husband Matt in an attempt to clear her name but untangles a deadly web of lust and deceit that leads directly to those she trusts the most.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Following the death of her husband, Ariel's mother Dana finds a friend in the mysterious Adam. When Dana's health starts to fail, Ariel suspects Adam might not have the best of intentions.

programme.title: A Roommate to Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty break-up, Faith needs a new roommate to supplement the rent and finds that something very strange is going on with the tenant who decides to move in.

programme.desc: The latest highlights, reaction and analysis of the biggest sport stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Millennial Money
programme.desc: Putting the "personal" in personal finance, get an inside look at the lives and finances of millennials. See exactly how much they earn, what they spend it on and how they invest. From starting a business to changing careers, getting in and out of debt, creating an unusual income stream, or casting it all aside to start over again young people reveal the steps they took to make it happen. Including how much they get paid, what they spend on food, shelter and fun, and how thy plan on saving for the future, Millennial Money takes a revealing look into the one area people seem to never talk about: their money.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.sub-title: Ep 137: Making a Killing / Doctor Drug Dealer
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victim's lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of. But how many luxury homes and exotic cars does it take to justify these white collar crimes? Ultimately for the crooks the dream turns into a nightmare when their shady plans unravel. "American Greed" follows the money through the eyes of the criminals, the victims, and the investigators who bring these scammers to justice.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Fake permits, undercover informants and millions of dollars. How a US government agency set out to prove suppliers to research labs were importing wild monkeys from Cambodia with false paperwork.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.sub-title: How this Tech CEO Jumped From a French Village to Silicon Valley
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Instacart CEO Fidji Simo in her hometown in the South of France, learning about her journey from a small fishing village to the echelons of Silicon Valley.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: The Advanced Micro Devices CEO spent the better part of her ten year career engineering one of the biggest turnarounds in Silicon Valley history. Now she's preparing for battle against NVIDIA.

programme.title: Inside Adani: A Bloomberg Exclusive
programme.desc: With unprecedented access to each of the scions and Gautam Adani himself, we see what succession looks like, inside one of the wealthiest and most opaque family businesses in the world.

programme.title: Posthuman with Emily Chang
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology. In this episode of Posthuman, we explore the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how we die.

programme.title: Leaders with Lacqua

programme.desc: When the family has to dress up for a family photo, Jessica decides to express herself.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: Let's Get Rolling!/ A Bit Of A Stretch!
programme.desc: It's MacBarm's annual croquet tournament and Zee has promised to make giant decorations to mark the occasion. / It's the opening day of the skyscraper in Pretty Big City and everything is done.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: When the Legion of Zoom gains control of the Batcave's giant T-Rex, MOE creates a giant Bat-robot to stop the marauding dinosaur.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Missing Crystal Pinecone/The Pretty Big Thing
programme.desc: Izzy and Timmy go to dig up treasure at the top of Lawrence Pinecone's Statue's shadow and find nothing there! / The mysterious "Pretty Big Thing" is scaring the people of Pretty Big City, so it's up to the Mechas to find out what it is.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: Yip Yip Tree Tree/ The Snowman Scarecrow
programme.desc: When all the ornaments on the Pretty Big City tree break, it's up to the Mechas to build new ones and save the holidays for their friends. / It's time for Zee and MacBarm's gift exchange, but the snowman scarecrow Zee made for MacBarm keeps blowing away!

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: Toff and Oula get super competitive: they both want to be recognized as Geo's "best Tangra-friend!" But they take it way too far, jeopardizing all of the friends' efforts to save the Tangracubes' house!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Zee accidentally turns Moobert giant with his growth ray and, to make matters worse, there is a storm heading towards the farm. / Timmy is excited to fly Ranger Nat's kite, but his excitement turns to stress as Nat's Kite flies away!

programme.title: Lucas the Spider
programme.desc: Lucas and Findley find an ice cube. When Lucas rides the ice cube in the sink and falls down the drain, a scared Findley rallies to save him.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Zee accidentally turns Moobert giant with his growth ray and, to make matters worse, there is a storm heading towards the farm. / Timmy is excited to fly Ranger Nat's kite, but his excitement turns to stress as Nat's Kite flies away!

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.sub-title: All For Two And Two For All
programme.desc: The Tangranimals want to show Geo the new games that "hatch" in springtime at the bottom of the canyon. But the fun transformations they make together all fall apart in no time!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: There's a leak at the space station and the solution is Zee's sticky slime, until it spills on Zee and MacBarm, who get stuck together. / When Marwyn runs out of ice, the Martians send a giant hunk of ice.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: They Sent Us A Pie/Dust In The Wind
programme.desc: A giant pie is sent to Pretty Big City to stop an asteroid, but that discovery is made only after the Mechas and friends have eaten the whole thing. / The Singing Stone Heads are ready to perform at Big Old Boulder Museum.

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: Toff is out to prove she's afraid of nothing, even when doing the riskiest of acrobatics! And even if it means putting herself, and everyone else, in danger!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: Cross That Bridge/ Knock Knock! Who's There?
programme.desc: Roof needs to drive the train across the ravine but cannot do so after the Martians take and break the bridge. / The newest version of the Zee Mobile is great at counting chickens but won't stop crashing into and ruining MacBarm's barn door.

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: Bao & Bao are eager to complete their collection of "cloud pearls". So Geo suggests they go directly inside the clouds to fetch the pearls at their source! But things don't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Mecha Builders

programme.sub-title: That Ol' Time Rock Rolls!/ Make Like A Banana And Split
programme.desc: Berta is taking a picture with Big Old Boulder for the museum, but needs the Mechas help when the boulder rolls down the hill towards the museum! / It's Food Day in Pretty Big City.

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: Jovial has brought his friends to a very popular spa. But Geo keeps doing transformations, and before long, he and his friends get thrown out after unwittingly breaking the spa rules!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: Pinecone Palooza/The Big Footed Cave Bird
programme.desc: It's Pinecone Palooza in Treetop Woods and everyone is getting ready to celebrate their favorite woodsman, Lawrence Pinecone. / The mythical Big-Footed Cave Bird is out and about in Treetop Woods collecting pinecones.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Christmas Bonus
programme.desc: When Boss Baby accidentally gets mistaken for an elf and sent to the North Pole on Christmas Eve, he mobilizes unpaid elf workers against an old nemesis: that charity-loving hippie people call Santa Claus. programme.desc: While Darius distracts Kash from his presentation with a competitive video game, the other kids struggle to free baby dinosaurs from the dinosaur nursery.

programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless search for other Night Furies.

programme.title: Dragons: Riders of Berk

programme.desc: When Eep and Dawn find a stranded egg, they eagerly take it in as their new pet, but when they learn the egg is not what it seems, they have to return it before it becomes dangerous.

programme.title: The Croods: Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug overhears Thunk accidentally call Phil "Dad", he tries to reconnect with Thunk by taking him to the natural spectacle known as "Big Shine."

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: What was first awe quickly becomes terror as the kids find themselves face-to-face with the newly freed Indominus Rex. When the kids find their camp destroyed, Darius must come to terms with the fact that his dream of Jurassic World may not be as perfect as he hoped.

programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books.

programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold's latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire.

programme.desc: After a crowverine gliding mishap, Dawn loses her confidence and tells Eep she's taking a break from adventures. Eep convinces Dawn to join her on one last adventure - climbing Grrr Mountain.

programme.sub-title: The Legends of the Power Gems: Chapter Four
programme.desc: With all three elemental power gems in hand, Fearless Leader sets out to take over the world. But with every use of the gems, the world becomes more unstable, and they're heading toward certain destruction.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter One
programme.desc: Every year, the world turns to Frostbite Falls' beloved cat Frostbite Frannie to declare the first day of summer vacation. When Frannie sees her tail, vacations can begin!

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: Whitebeard uses the Grow Key to make himself 40' tall. But the key breaks! So the Wanderers take the key to Wizard Fix-It in Moscow. While fixing the key, Fix-It accidentally makes Waldo, Wenda and herself two inches tall! So begins a Nutcracker-like mini-adventure in Moscow to retrieve the key from Odlulu and Fritz.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine's Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dew Drop Diaries
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: TrollsTopia
programme.sub-title: Don't Make Me Laugh / Hair-aldine: The Musical
programme.desc: Based on the beloved toy property and DreamWorks feature films, Trolls: TrollsTopia! is the next chapter in the Trolls' hair-raising adventures. During the Trolls sequel, Trolls: World Tour, everything gets turned on its hair when Poppy learns there are five other musically themed Trolls tribes scattered throughout the forest. Now, armed with her endless positivity, she decides to bring delegates from the Country Western, Classical, Funk, Techno and Rock tribes to live together in her village, to form a new Trolls City and promote friendship and harmony in a grand experiment she calls TrollsTopia!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: t's the story of twins Dak and Leyla who were rescued from a shipwreck at a very early age by a kindly mother dragon who raised them alongside her own son, Winger. Because they were raised by dragons, Dak and Leyla cannot only ride dragons, they have learned to speak their language and what sounds like growls or roars to anyone else, sound like perfect English to them.Now, these two kids and their five dragon friends pay forward their mother's kindness by rescuing dragons and people.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it "the Kelp way."

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she's afraid to try new things because she doesn't want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: All aboard the Mermaid Christmas Cruise to help Santa Kitty deliver Christmas presents to our Gabby Cats who live under the sea! When Santa Kitty suddenly has a sleigh-emergency and quickly needs to find another way to deliver presents to all the cats and kittens, the Gabby Cats connect the reindeer kitties to the Mermaid Christmas Cruise ship so it's ready for takeoff just in time for Christmas! For our Cat of The Day, we craft a Christmas Kitty Cat Surprise Box Tower!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky enlists Abigail Turo Snips and their horses to help plan a surprise birthday party for Pru that goes disastrously wrong.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents-her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents-her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Soggy Salvation of the Swirling Sweatnami
programme.desc: Tired of mean Mr. Krupp, the boys go back in time to prevent him from becoming a bully, but discover that their plan has backfired when they return to the present.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Sickening Fumes of Smartsy Fartsy
programme.desc: In order to retrieve Mr. Krupp's locked up rule book, George and Harold use an invention that ends up turning against them.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: The Uncuddleables have struck the Lil Dumpling baby pageant, replacing all of Baby Corp's super-cute top 5%er babies with not-cute bottom 5%ers. Boss, Tina and their field team race to caravan the 5%ers from their homes to the pageant before Nannycam deploys the nuclear option of unleashing the dangerously cute UBO on stage to salvage a Lil Dumpling win.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Boss Baby and Tina reject the 5%er system that says the cuter you are, the more love you deserve. Teaming up with the Uncuddleables, the team tries to take down the system from within, forming a resistance of the eight department heads of Baby Corp in the hopes of changing the way we look at Baby Love forever.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: When the campers' water supply slows to a trickle, Kenji and Darius head into the jungle to inverstigate. There, they discover a magnificent watering hole where predators and prey peacefully co-exist. Meanwhile, Brooklynn, Sammy, and Yaz go on an investigative journey of their own and find themselves at Wu's Genetics Lab, trapped by a trio of Baryonyxes.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: After they realize other people have arrived on Isla Nublar, the campers are thrilled at the prospect of rescue. Darius and Brooklynn end up at odds; Darius connects with the dino-loving couple of eco-tourists, Mitch and Tiff, while Brooklynn distrusts their guide, Hap. Things come to a head, Brooklynn and Kenji flee the guide into the jungle and run into an old friend.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Harmful Horrors of the Harrowing Hiveschool
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Preposterous Pulverizing of the Pestering Poopacabra
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Dastardlys Deed of the Devious Diddlysaurus
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Our team's startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a "Space Race", competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend "moon landing" for a baby - a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling "Adult Babies" before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina's startup company for exploding baby Iggy's favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp's current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping!
