programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: When the town's well runs dry, Hiccup and Toothless discover a group of baby Whispering Death dragons living in the tunnels underneath, planted there by Alvin.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter Two
programme.desc: When a mysterious goop gives Fearless Leader real life superpowers, Rocky and Bullwinkle must reprise their masked hero personas.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter Three
programme.desc: The mystery goop strikes again when Rocky's stress ball falls into a vat of goop, making it sentient and gigantic! Now the stress ball is bouncing through New York City, getting bigger and bigger.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: The Strutter siblings hold a yard sale and babysit at the same time. Archibald races for a big prize: a lifetime supply of his favorite cereal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Pawston's annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it's Tag's year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Dew Drop Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper unknowingly drops her cooking camp application on the way to post office, it's up to the Dew Drops to get it into that big blue mailbox. / When Cassie accidentally places Lola's beloved, old toy wand in a box marked for a giveaway drive in the park, the Dew Drops must find a way to retrieve the wand before it ends up in the hands of an entirely new family.

programme.title: TrollsTopia
programme.desc: Based on the beloved toy property and DreamWorks feature films, Trolls: TrollsTopia! is the next chapter in the Trolls' hair-raising adventures. During the Trolls sequel, Trolls: World Tour, everything gets turned on its hair when Poppy learns there are five other musically themed Trolls tribes scattered throughout the forest. Now, armed with her endless positivity, she decides to bring delegates from the Country Western, Classical, Funk, Techno and Rock tribes to live together in her village, to form a new Trolls City and promote friendship and harmony in a grand experiment she calls TrollsTopia!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it's better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: t's the story of twins Dak and Leyla who were rescued from a shipwreck at a very early age by a kindly mother dragon who raised them alongside her own son, Winger. Because they were raised by dragons, Dak and Leyla cannot only ride dragons, they have learned to speak their language and what sounds like growls or roars to anyone else, sound like perfect English to them.Now, these two kids and their five dragon friends pay forward their mother's kindness by rescuing dragons and people.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells a tale about unicorns sailing in ships on clouds in search of Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: All aboard the Mermaid Christmas Cruise to help Santa Kitty deliver Christmas presents to our Gabby Cats who live under the sea! When Santa Kitty suddenly has a sleigh-emergency and quickly needs to find another way to deliver presents to all the cats and kittens, the Gabby Cats connect the reindeer kitties to the Mermaid Christmas Cruise ship so it's ready for takeoff just in time for Christmas! For our Cat of The Day, we craft a Christmas Kitty Cat Surprise Box Tower!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what's inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy's garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mache Caturn.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.sub-title: Lucky And The Cowboy Next Door
programme.desc: When the annual roundup and town dance brings cowboy Javier to Miradero Lucky finds a new friend who can teach her and Spirit a new trick.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents-her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents-her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Troublesome Treachery of the Thieving Toot Fairy
programme.desc: George and Harold race against Mr. Krupp to try to get him fired before they get expelled.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Tenuous Takedown of the Tyrannical Teachertrons
programme.desc: In the season opener, George and Harold have returned to school due to a technicality, but the school has been taken over by Melvin and a cyborg Melvin from the future! Their goal is to make the school extremely difficult by replacing all the teachers with Teachertron robots. Suffering under the new regime and without Mr. Krupp/Captain Underpants on hand to help, the boys hypnotize gym teacher Mr. Meaner and turn him into Sergeant Boxers to fight back.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Fired from Baby Corp and trying to build their own business, Boss Baby and Tina waste all their startup funds immediately, requiring a loan from Banker Baby Benny. In order to receive their seed money and get their company rolling, they have to rebuild the town's faith in a baby who made everyone miss a huge sporting even (and they have to do it on a very limited budget).

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Unable to land baby clients, Boss and Tina take in a naughty little puppy as a side hustle, trying to earn a little extra scrap. But once they discover the dogs in the neighborhood are stealing for a puppy trainer named Becker, the mission gets much bigger, and our team is forced to earn a little Puppy Love for once.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: In this story of survival, Ben must overcome all his trauma and fears as he contends with hungry dinosaurs, a germ-filled jungle, and a rapidly-growing Bumpy. After he faces a rite of passage against the battered and burned Carnotaurus (from Season One), Ben comes out a different person: he now has the heart of a fearless (perhaps too fearless) warrior but is still housed in the same frail body as before.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: Brooklynn, Kenji, and Ben realize that while the married couple are actually nefarious hunters, cranky guide Hap is actually trying to save the kids! And now they have to help him save their friends! Unfortunately, they are waylaid when they run back into the trio of Baryonyxes, while back at the campsite, the couple shows their true colors and takes Darius, Sammy, and Yasmina hostage.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Shadowy Syndrome of the Sinister Splotch
programme.desc: Captain Underpants becomes a wanted man in underwear when footage surfaces of a robber who looks exactly like him. George and Harold, positive it's an impostor, try to track down the perp and bring him to justice. But can the boys do this before Captain Underpants is found guilty?

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Blitzkrieg of the Bothersome Butt-erflies
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Problematic Pandemonium of the Punishing Plungerina
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict "no-babies" policy. Meanwhile, Banker Baby Benny visits the startup company to check on his investment. Tina has to cover up how the heat has split her coworkers into lawless factions fighting over a fan and a mist cooler.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: An overworked and under loved Precious has to choose between the Templeton Family startup business or Crispin Biscuits' fun playtime. Meanwhile, the company makes its first purchase: upgraded communicators! R & D Baby Simmons is reluctant to fix the model they have, which picks up signals from her favorite lvorian soap opera, "Bridges Aflame." Over a live broadcast, Simmons must convince the cast to tie up every loose plot thread before she has to lose the signal forever.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Uncle Benji makes a surprise visit to the Templeton Family with a cute baby of his own: Lil Bit Guerrero! Tina gets jealous of Carol doting on Lil Bit, while Benji reveals that in order to make his daughter proud of him, he's applied to become a Federal Agent. With Boss Baby's cover at stake, it's up to the Templeton Family to get Benji out of their hair as he sniffs around for a case that could garner the attention from federal law enforcement.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: Snotlout is concerned when his dragon's flame goes out and the kids have to figure out how to reignite it before it's too late.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter Four
programme.desc: In an attempt to reverse Fearless Leader's goop-induced evil powers, Rocky and Bullwinkle travel to an alternate reality to get an "anti-goop." Once there they discover opposite versions of everyone they know from the real world, including a NICE Boris and Natasha!

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter Five
programme.desc: It all comes down to this! With anti-goop in hand from the opposite dimension, Rocky and Bullwinkle set out to take away Fearless Leader's super powers and save the world.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.sub-title: The Chicken Has Landed / The Night of the Nibbler
programme.desc: Archibald takes an unexpected trip to outer space. When a yummy recipe goes missing, Archibald P.I. sets out to crack the case.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become "substitute Kate" and make sure the animals are cared for. But when the animals go wild in the snow, Melman's future-paramedic skills are put to the test during an outbreak of stubbed toes and boo-boos. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he's cut out to be a paramedic - until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene's debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn't ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab's introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.sub-title: Clucky Day Take Me Out to the Fetch Game
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he's missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. When there's a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it's up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don't have to forfeit.

programme.title: Dew Drop Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to get the penny across town and back into Marcus' pocket before showtime. / When Nicholas rolls the hamster ball (with Hammy inside) out into the streets, the Dew Drops must get Hammy back home safely.

programme.title: TrollsTopia
programme.desc: Based on the beloved toy property and DreamWorks feature films, Trolls: TrollsTopia! is the next chapter in the Trolls' hair-raising adventures. programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat's life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it's lonely at the top.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: t's the story of twins Dak and Leyla who were rescued from a shipwreck at a very early age by a kindly mother dragon who raised them alongside her own son, Winger. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.sub-title: Best Friends Day / The White Whale
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn't love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch - and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

For our Cat of The Day, we craft a Christmas Kitty Cat Surprise Box Tower!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.
